app.heroSubtitle: Connect your GoMining session and generate a complete all-rewards Excel report in one click. Your token never leaves your browser.
app.rateLimitsNotice: This app currently runs on free-tier services (Cloudflare, CoinGecko, FX Rates API). If a request fails due to rate limits, wait a moment and try again, or try again tomorrow.
app.unofficialNotice: This is an unofficial tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the GoMining team.
app.openSourceNotice: This app and extension were built with security and transparency in mind. The full source code is open source and accessible to anyone who wants to inspect it before using it.
app.sheetsToFetch: {{fetch}} sheet(s) will be fetched. {{stored}} stored, will be probed for updates first.
app.allSheetsStored: All sheets stored. Will probe for updates before building.

auth.compatible: Compatible with Chrome, Opera and Orion (Mobile iOS).
auth.step1: Open GoMining and click the extension icon
auth.step2: Click 'Sync to Exporter' when the extension shows 'Ready to sync.'
auth.step3: Once synced, the extension shows 'Hello [name] 👋' and 'Profile synced.'
auth.step4: Click 'Open Exporter' and you will be redirected here
auth.latestVersion: Make sure you have the latest version of the extension.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sync again via the extension.
auth.tokenInvalid: Extension token is invalid or expired.
auth.noToken: No token found. Please sync via the RewardTrackr extension first.

dataViewer.noData: No cached data for this sheet. Export it first from the main panel.
dataViewer.newStructure: This table has a new structure. Please re-export to load the updated data.
dataViewer.kwhCostNote: kWh cost: GoMining uses the project average over the billing period ($0.05–$0.07/kWh).
dataViewer.maintenanceUsdNote: Maintenance is always calculated in USD and then converted to the selected currency.

export.walletPricingDesc: Applies only to Bounties, Deposits, Withdrawals and Transactions. GoMining API does not return fiat pricing for these sheets, so we enrich them using CoinGecko during export.
export.includeFiatPricing: Include fiat pricing (USD). Extra fiat is configured below.
export.rateLimitWarning: This can take some time. CoinGecko free plan has rate limits, and each limit hit triggers a 60s cooldown.
export.includeExtraConversion: Include extra conversion column (USD is always included)
export.cacheCleared: Cache cleared. Next export will fetch fresh data.
export.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please re-sync via the RewardTrackr extension.
export.skippedPending: {{name}}: Skipped {{count}} pending reinvestment entr(y/ies), will retry on next export.
export.limitReached: Export limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.
export.loadingPageNew: {{name}}: Loading page {{page}} ({{count}} new records so far)...
export.networkError: Network error: Failed to reach the GoMining API. Please try again later or report the issue [here](https://github.com/JoseGouveia9/RewardTrackr/issues).

share.publiclyVisible: Your records will be publicly visible. Anyone with the link can view them, read-only.
share.communityPublic: Your profile will appear in the public community list.
share.communityPrivate: Your profile stays accessible only by direct link.
share.workerRequired: Sharing requires a Cloudflare Worker. See {{link}}.
share.updateWarning: This will update the data of your shared link with the currently selected options.
share.communitySubtitle: Shared profiles from RewardTrackr users. Click any row to view their records.
share.noProfiles: No shared profiles yet. Be the first!

support.tipsDescription: Tips help cover API costs and keep this tool free and unrestricted. Tip via crypto below.

referral.signUpIntro: Sign up with my referral code and get these bonuses:
referral.useCode: Use code 9GFJB2X on your profile and at checkout when buying your first miner
referral.bonus1Title: 5% bonus in TH on your first miner purchase
referral.bonus2Title: $20 cashback in TH for the first $100 spent with the GoMining card
